name: IdsEdwCmnPrctEducDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT CPD.CMN_PRCT_EDUC_SK, CPD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CPD.CMN_PRCT_ID, CPD.EDUC_SEQ_NO, CPD.CMN_PRCT_SK, CPD.GRAD_IN, CPD.CMPL_DT_SK, CPD.STRT_DT_SK, CPD.CRDTL_SPEC_NM, CPD.DGR_NM, CPD.INSTUT_NM, CPD.PGM_NM, COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT_EDUC CPD LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON CPD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CM.CD_MPPNG_SK) SELECT cte.CMN_PRCT_EDUC_SK AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte.CMN_PRCT_ID, cte.EDUC_SEQ_NO AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte.CMN_PRCT_SK, cte.CMPL_DT_SK AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_CMPL_DT_SK, cte.CRDTL_SPEC_NM AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_CRDTL_SPEC_NM, cte.DGR_NM AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_DGR_NM, cte.GRAD_IN AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_GRAD_IN, cte.INSTUT_NM AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_INSTUT_NM, cte.PGM_NM AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_PGM_NM, cte.STRT_DT_SK AS CMN_PRCT_EDUC_STRT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwCmnPrctEducDExtr
DB2 connector brings in data from IDS table CMN_PRCT_EDUC
Data is written into a load ready SF file named as CMN_PRCT_EDUC_D.dat
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
